description:
Collect inventory data and metrics of your hosts and sends it to the New Relic platform.


What's Changed
- feat: support aws efs mounts in storage samples in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2069
- chore(deps): bump golang.org/x/oauth2 from 0.20.0 to 0.27.0 in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2093
- chore(deps): update nri-prometheus version to v2.27.0 in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2094
Full Changelog: https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/compare/1.65.4...1.65.5
